meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Operational contact routing for BioChroma Labs: department email, phone, and sample submission resources.

hero.title: Choose the fastest path to the right lab team.
hero.lead: Use the contact routes below for analytical testing, microbiology testing, product development support, and sample logistics. No forms—just direct channels.
hero.mediaCaptionText: Direct department routing for faster coordination.

routingSteps: Choose your primary need (analytical, microbiology, product development, or operations).
Use the listed department email for technical requests and documentation.
For urgent coordination, call the main office line during business hours.

pathways.title: Analytical / Chemistry Inquiries
pathways.audience: Founders, manufacturers, and QA teams needing chemistry testing support.
pathways.description: Route assay planning, test menu questions, and chemistry method discussions directly to the chemistry team.

pathways.title: Microbiology Inquiries
pathways.audience: Teams planning microbiology testing and contamination-risk evaluations.
pathways.description: Send microbiology scope details and sample context directly to the microbiology group.

pathways.title: Product Development Support
pathways.audience: Operators and formulators developing or optimizing products.
pathways.description: Use this route for development planning, feasibility discussions, and integrated testing support.

pathways.title: Sample Submission / Courier Coordination
pathways.audience: Existing and new clients shipping or coordinating sample logistics.
pathways.description: Coordinate pickups, receiving windows, and shipping details with operations.

headquarters.responseNote: Department emails are monitored by operational and technical staff. Include project context, sample matrix, timeline, and required reporting needs for faster routing.

sampleResources.title: Sample Submission Form
sampleResources.description: Use the official submission document for incoming sample logistics and chain-of-custody details.
sampleResources.label: Download submission form

sampleResources.title: Courier Scheduling
sampleResources.description: For pickup coordination and delivery timing, contact courier operations directly.
sampleResources.label: Email courier operations

existingClients.title: Returning clients
existingClients.description: For repeat work, include your previous project name or sample ID in the subject line so your request can be matched quickly.
